# Knowledge base — index

A one-screen catalog of what this project knows. The assistant keeps it current as it ingests and
distills, so you (and it) can find things without scanning every file. Read this first.

This folder is already a **Duo vault** — the frontmatter above is the marker. If you use Duo, open
this folder and select it; otherwise ignore the marker (it's inert and renders fine on GitHub).
